title: Bracken Rose
body_html:
Size: 7.5mm

 

The "Bracken Rose" design was brought to life with the vision of formal Dahlia flowers in mind. We think this "Bracken Rose" will flourish in a wise variety of peices due to its symmetry, low profile, and moderate size. This would go great in a Conch, Helix, Flat, Philtrum, a bold Nostril, High Nostrils, or even a Bridge!

title: Leo
body_html:
Size: 6.5mm

 

The "Leo" was designed by and named after our very own jewelry protégé, believe me, he has quite an eye for designing! The "Leo" has a sleek symmetry and curves, when juxtaposed by the line work and angles it creates an end suitable for a wide variety of piercings. Outside of smaller anatomy areas, we truly think this piece will shine in most any piercing you are looking to adorn with its soft, timeless style!

title: Claddagh Hands
body_html:
Size: 8.5mm x 6.2mm

The "Claddagh Hands" represent friendship and togetherness. It's the perfect piece to tie into any setup. The "Claddagh Hands" would look great on a Helix, Conch, or Flat!

title: Staccato Clicker
body_html: The "Staccato Clicker" is bold yet refined, this design delivers effortless luxury with a modern edge. Perfect for a Helix, Conch, or even as a statement piece for a Nostril!

title: Gemmed Shuriken
body_html:
Size: 8.5mm

The "Gemmed Shuriken" is designed to shimmer with every movement, distract your enemies from a distance with this piece! The "Gemmed Shuriken" is suitable for a Helix, Flat, Lobes, Conch, Snonch, or Philtrum.

Size: 8.5mm

title: Acorn with Gem
body_html:
Size: 6.5mm x 5.5mm

The "Acorn with Gem" is an enchanting design that embodies our love for all things nature, with a 1.75mm shimmering gem embedded in the cutest little classic seedling. It's sure to be a hit when featured on a Helix, Flat, Conch, or Lobe piercing!

title: Chocolate Bar
body_html:
Size: 4x7.4mm

The "Chocolate Bar" is an elevated essential that exudes luxury, decadence, and elegance. With four dainty 1mm gems and a deliciously low profile, this piece is sure to shine in a Flat, a Conch, or a Helix. It will bring a subtle shimmer to the top of a Vertical Helix, or even as a low profile option for paired High Nostrils. The opportunities are broad with this gorgeous end!

title: Eternity
body_html:
Size: 8mm

Effortlessly glamorous and undeniably sophisticated, the symmetrical components of this piece make it perfect for a wide variety of piercings that may be in an area that is prone to spinning, or for matching pairs! Such as a Surface Anchor, Nostrils, Philtrum, Navel, Flat, Conch, the illusive Cheek Piercings, or even in a more classic placement such as Lobes!

title: Acorn
body_html:
Size: 6.5mm x 5.5mm

The "Acorn" is an enchanting design that embodies our love for all things nature! This cute little classic seedling is sure to be a hit when featured on a Helix, Flat, Conch, or Lobe piercing!

Size: 4x7mm

A radiant expression of manifestation, positive vibes, and a timeless sparkle! Perfect for Lobes, Helix, Flat, Conches, and more!

title: Forge Clicker
body_html: Where modern engineering blends fluidity and structure for handcrafted, heirloom-quality style! We love seeing the "Forge Clicker" in Coin Slots, Helixes, Navels, a Bold Nostril, or a Show Stopping Conch. Tag us, we'd love to see how you adorn the "Forge Clicker"!

title: Vincent Clicker
body_html: Designed to catch the light...and every eye in the room! The "Vincent Clicker" blends modern sophistication with show stopping sparkle to perfectly silhouette a subtle Septum or  glimmering Conch. *Please leave a note if there is a specific gem pattern preferred for this clicker.*

title: Heart of Thorns
body_html:
Size: 7x8.5mm

 

The "Heart of Thorns" is a gorgeous statement of a soft heart, with sharp boundaries, and lots of sparkle. An edgy addition to any Helix, Conch, Nostril, Philtrum, Flat, Lip or Labret piercing. Just be careful with those thorns!

title: Vienna Dangle
body_html: The "Vienna Dangle" embodies effortless sophistication, featuring a graceful drop silhouette that captures the light with every movement for a look that is both delicate and undeniably captivating! The "Vienna Dangle" would illuminate a Navel, Rook, or Lobe with ease.

title: Buddha's Hand
body_html:
Size: 9.5mm x 4mm

"Buddha's Hand" seamlessly blends tranquility and peace with heirloom-quality shine and shimmer. Place this unique piece in a Conch, Helix, Flat, or Lobe to add a bold, polished elegance to your piercings!

title: Harmony
body_html:
Size: 7mm x 8mm

The "Harmony" plays with balance and contrast, placing luminous gems on opposing sides in subtly varied sizes to create a composition that feels soft, fluid, and intentional. The groovy silhouette is reminiscent of the style from the '60's and 70's while still being playfully futuristic. This piece is sure to shine on Lobes, a Conch, Helix, yet low-profile enough to sit comfortably on a Flat!

title: Gemmed Oval
body_html:
Sizes:
Small: 4mm x 6mm
Big: 8mm x 4.5mm

 

The "Gemmed Oval" showcases a luminous off-set gem (1.5mm for the Small, or 2mm for the Big) to create a composition that feels soft, fluid, and intentional. The classic Oval silhouette is reminiscent of the style from the '60's and 70's while still being playfully futuristic. This piece is sure to shine on Lobes, a Conch, Helix, a Bold Stacked Lobe addition, yet low-profile enough to sit comfortably on a Flat!

title: Ventura Seamless Ring
body_html: Soft, golden, filligree lovingly carresses a sparkling 2mm gem in our "Ventura Seamless Ring". This stunningly detailed piece would compliment a Septum or Daith, beautifully!

title: Twinkling Lights Clicker
body_html:
If you're a fan of Bold, Show Stopping, Jaw Dropping gold and glimmer - the "Twinkling Lights Clicker" was made for YOU!
This stunning, dripping in gems, beauty would look incredible in a Coin Slot, Conch, Helix, Vertical Helix, Rook, Labret, Navel, or even in a Bold Nostril piercing!
Gems featured in this clicker - Orange CZ, Viva Magenta CZ, Champagne CZ, Aqua CZ, Amethyst CZ, Peridot CZ, Tanzanite CZ, Garnet CZ, Green CZ, Aqua CZ
The piece will look exactly as it appears in the picture.

Note: If you would like to change the colors of any of the gems, please contact us before placing an order, and we will make the piece according to your customizations.

title: Ashvine Seamless Ring
body_html: This luminous gold wrapped intertwiningly around the dainty gems of the "Ashvine Seamless Ring" is a delicate marvel. Ready to adorn your Nostril, Lobes, Helix, Conch, or even Rook!

title: Monarch Seamless Ring
body_html: An ornate, detailed, gem encrusted ring fit for royalty is precisely what we think of the magnificent "Monarch Seamless Ring". This ring may be bestowed upon a Rook, Coin Slot, Nostril, Conch, Labret, Lobes, or even a Helix piercing!

title: Monroe Seamless Ring
body_html: The "Monroe Seamless Ring" is a dazzling ring that captivates and demands attention from the varying gem cuts and sizes to the bold edges and negative space. This ring is bound to be a timeless icon when adorned in a Helix, Navel, Lip, Labret, Coin Slot, Conch, Rook, or Snug!

title: Coronet
body_html:
Size: 6mm x 11.5mm

 

The "Coronet" is a radiantly bold beauty that encompasses a look inspired by timeless classic appeal. From the ritzy Oval-Cut gems to the dainty accenting rounds to the stunningly complimentary curve of it all - the "Coronet" is truly the belle of the ball! This piece was made to mimic the natural curvature of the ear, perfect for a Helix. However, the "Coronet" in a Navel would be STUNNING! We can't wait to see how you style this piece.

Bring a bold look to any person that may not want the glimmer of gems, but still wants to show out and show up with a beautiful gold sparkle!

Featuring a detailed cow skull design with a classic Yee Haw flair, the Buckaroo brings rugged charm to any collection. Perfect for those who embrace the frontier aesthetic, it's an ideal addition to any piercing! Whether you're a true cowpoke or simply love Western style, this skull charm delivers genuine character and unmistakable attitude.

The lustrous pearl catches light beautifully, adding understated glamour to any ensemble. It's the perfect addition to enhance any piercing!

Versatile and striking, it suits a wide range of piercings: nostril, philtrum, helix, flat, conch, or lobes and more! Making it an essential addition to any Western-inspired setup. Whether you're claiming your territory or simply embracing frontier spirit, this badge delivers genuine character and undeniable style to any piercing!

Wear it as a statement of individuality and unwavering Yee Haw style!
